# The 1 comp. PK model with dose-dependent bioavailability.

# [INPUT]
ka = 1;
V = 1;
Cl = 1;

# [MODEL]
# PK model definition

### Priors
MW = 627.57;  					# g/mol for INCB161734 

### Explicit functions
Cc = Ac/V;
Cc_nM = Cc/MW*1000000;			# nmol/L

### Initial conditions
Ad(0) = 0;
Ac(0) = 0;

### Differential equations
d/dt(Ad) = - ka*Ad;
d/dt(Ac) = ka*Ad - Cl*Ac/V;

# [OUTPUT]
# output = {Cc_nM}
